strengths: 15+ years of full-stack software engineering experience with diverse technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, etc.)
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective, demonstrating product-building skills
concerns: No evidence of AI/ML-specific products or platforms built with AI (only general software development)
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field despite extensive experience
Limited explicit leadership or strategic advisory experience with customers/partners on AI technologies
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience requirement (15 years) and shows strong software engineering skills, but lacks evidence of AI-specific products/platforms (only general development) and advanced AI degrees. The AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising but not sufficient for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Entrepreneurial experience is a plus but not a key differentiator.
